pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Spring Boot parent version to a newer patch release.
Change the target Java version property from 17 to 21 to align with the JDK migration.
pom.xml.why_exists: The project is migrating to JDK 21; without this change, the build would target JDK 17, potentially missing JDK 21 features or failing strict compatibility checks if enforced.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add the jaxws-rt dependency to provide JAXB/JAX-WS implementations removed from the JDK module system.
pom.xml.why_exists: JAXB and JAX-WS APIs were removed from the JDK in Java 11. Without this dependency (or similar), code using these APIs will fail at runtime with NoClassDefFoundError or at compile time if the API is not on the classpath.
